This campsite is designated for campers with horses or mules. It is located at the back of Sage Loop on very uneven pavement. This site is limited to six people, three tents, and two vehicles. The combined legnth of your truck and horse trailer may not exceed 30 ft. If your combined lenghth exceeds 30 ft, you will be required to park your truck at Camper Services which is a 15 minute walk from your campsite. This is a historic area and the roads are narrow and the truning radius is tight.  ** Driveway and Parking are shared with Horse Camp A **.
Someone from your party must remain on site with livestock at all times.
Only weed free hay and straw is allowed. Pelleted feed, hay cubes and grain products are allowed. Food and feed storage arae strictly enforced due to the abundant wildlfie within campground.
All livestock must be accompanied by a current health certificate and Coggins.
All manure must be picked up and packed out of park. The park has no facilities for processing manure.

This campsite is designated for campers with horses or mules . It is located at the back of Sage Loop on very uneven pavement. This site is limited to six people, six equines, three tents, and two vehicles. The combined legnth of your truck and horse trailer may not exceed 30 ft. If your combined lenghth exceeds 30 ft, you will be required to park your truck at Camper Services which is a 15 minute walk from your campsite. This is a historic area and the roads are narrow and the turning radius is tight.  ** Driveway and Parking are shared with Horse Camp B **.
Someone from your party must remain on site with livestock at all times.
Only weed free hay and straw is allowed. Pelleted feed, hay cubes and grain products are allowed. Food and feed storage are strictly enforced due to the abundant wildlife within the campground.
All livestock must be accompanied by a current health certificate and Coggins test. Coggins is required on ALL stock, not just out of state.
*** All manure MUST be picked up & packed out of the park. The park has no facilities for processing manure ***
